steps.title: Recognize the complex list
steps.content: The sentence lists three deserts, and each item includes a rank: the Sonoran Desert, the Great Salt Desert, and the Ferlo Desert. Because the items contain internal commas, semicolons should separate the list items.

steps.title: Keep each rank attached
steps.content: Choice A and choice D place a semicolon between the Great Salt Desert and its rank, splitting a noun from its modifier. Choice C runs list items together without needed semicolons. The remaining choice separates the desert entries while keeping each rank attached to its desert. The answer is B.
